tasks.label: backend
tasks.command: if (Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 8000 -State Listen -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue) { Write-Host '[backend] JA ESTA NO AR na porta 8000 - nao vou duplicar.' } else { python -m uvicorn app.main:app --reload --host 0.0.0.0 --port 8000 }

tasks.label: ngrok
tasks.command: if (Get-Process ngrok -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue) { Write-Host '[ngrok] JA ESTA RODANDO - nao vou duplicar.' } else { ngrok http --url=unopened-employed-cedar.ngrok-free.dev 8000 }
